business.name: QuickFix Chennai — Electrical & Plumbing
business.tagline: Trusted electricians & plumbers, at your door across Chennai.

whyUs.title: On-time arrival
whyUs.text: We respect your schedule across Chennai.

whyUs.title: Service warranty
whyUs.text: Workmanship backed by a service guarantee.

reviews.name: Priya R.
reviews.text: Fan and wiring fixed the same day. Polite and neat work.

reviews.name: Karthik S.
reviews.text: Booked on WhatsApp at night, plumber came by 9 AM. Great!

reviews.name: Fathima A.
reviews.text: Geyser installed quickly. Fair price, will use again.

reviews.name: Ravi K.
reviews.text: Drainage blockage cleared fast. Very professional team.

faq.a: Pick a service, choose a preferred time, and tap ‘Book on WhatsApp’. Your booking lands in our WhatsApp and we confirm the slot.
All over Chennai — including all the localities listed on this page.
Mon–Sun, 8 AM – 8 PM. For emergencies, message us anytime and we’ll do our best.
Prices shown are estimate ranges. The final amount is confirmed after we inspect the issue — no hidden charges.
The time you choose is a preferred slot. We confirm or suggest the closest available time over WhatsApp.
